Q03_definitions.definition:
SELECT fecha,
    cod_rt,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM nombre_local_rr), ''::text), cod_rt) AS local_nombre_rr,
    marca,
    upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(marca, ''::text))) AS marca_norm,
    sku,
    descripcion_producto AS producto,
    inv_u AS stock,
    venta_u AS venta_7,
        CASE
            WHEN (inv_u < 0) THEN 'SI'::text
            ELSE 'NO'::text
        END AS negativo,
        CASE
            WHEN ((venta_u > 0) AND (inv_u > 0) AND (inv_u < venta_u)) THEN 'SI'::text
            ELSE 'NO'::text
        END AS riesgo_quiebre,
    COALESCE(otros, ''::text) AS otros,
    ingested_at,
    id
   FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON ((btrim(f.cod_rt)), (btrim(f.sku)), (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(f.marca, ''::text))))) f.id,
            f.fecha,
            btrim(f.cod_rt) AS cod_rt,
            f.nombre_local_rr,
            btrim(f.marca) AS marca,
            btrim(f.sku) AS sku,
            f.descripcion_producto,
            f.inv_u,
            f.venta_u,
            f.otros,
            f.ingested_at
           FROM fact_stock_venta f
          WHERE ((NULLIF(btrim(COALESCE(f.cod_rt, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL) AND (NULLIF(btrim(COALESCE(f.sku, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL) AND (NULLIF(btrim(COALESCE(f.marca, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL))
          ORDER BY (btrim(f.cod_rt)), (btrim(f.sku)), (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(f.marca, ''::text)))), f.fecha DESC, f.ingested_at DESC, f.id DESC) x;

WITH scope_pair AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT s.cod_rt,
            s.local_nombre_rr,
            s.cliente,
            s.cliente_norm,
            s.responsable_tipo,
            s.responsable,
            s.responsable_norm
           FROM v_scope_cliente_responsable_rr_distinct s
        )
 SELECT sp.responsable_tipo,
    sp.responsable,
    sp.responsable_norm,
    sp.cod_rt,
    sp.local_nombre_rr,
    sp.cliente,
    sp.cliente_norm,
    v.fecha,
    v.marca,
    v.marca_norm,
    v.sku,
    v.producto,
    v.stock,
    v.venta_7,
    v.negativo,
    v.riesgo_quiebre,
    v.otros
   FROM (scope_pair sp
     JOIN mv_scope_fact_latest_cliente v ON (((v.cod_rt = sp.cod_rt) AND (v.marca_norm = sp.cliente_norm))));

WITH rr_base AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT rr.cod_rt,
            COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM rr.local_nombre), ''::text), rr.cod_rt) AS local_nombre_rr,
            NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM rr.cliente), ''::text) AS cliente,
            upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(rr.cliente, ''::text))) AS cliente_norm,
            NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM rr.gestores), ''::text) AS gestor,
            upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(rr.gestores, ''::text))) AS gestor_norm,
            NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM rr.supervisor), ''::text) AS supervisor,
            upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(rr.supervisor, ''::text))) AS supervisor_norm,
            NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM rr.rutero), ''::text) AS rutero,
            NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM rr.reponedor), ''::text) AS reponedor,
            concat_ws(' — '::text, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM rr.rutero), ''::text), NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM rr.reponedor), ''::text)) AS rr_persona,
            NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM rr.modalidad), ''::text) AS modalidad
           FROM ruta_rutero rr
          WHERE ((NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(rr.cod_rt, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL) AND (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(rr.cliente, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL))
        ), rr_gestor AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT rr_base.cod_rt,
            rr_base.local_nombre_rr,
            rr_base.cliente,
            rr_base.cliente_norm,
            'GESTOR'::text AS responsable_tipo,
            rr_base.gestor AS responsable,
            rr_base.gestor_norm AS responsable_norm,
            rr_base.rutero,
            rr_base.reponedor,
            rr_base.rr_persona,
            rr_base.modalidad
           FROM rr_base
          WHERE (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(rr_base.gestor, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL)
        ), rr_supervisor AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT rr_base.cod_rt,
            rr_base.local_nombre_rr,
            rr_base.cliente,
            rr_base.cliente_norm,
            'SUPERVISOR'::text AS responsable_tipo,
            rr_base.supervisor AS responsable,
            rr_base.supervisor_norm AS responsable_norm,
            rr_base.rutero,
            rr_base.reponedor,
            rr_base.rr_persona,
            rr_base.modalidad
           FROM rr_base
          WHERE (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(rr_base.supervisor, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL)
        )
 SELECT rr_gestor.cod_rt,
    rr_gestor.local_nombre_rr,
    rr_gestor.cliente,
    rr_gestor.cliente_norm,
    rr_gestor.responsable_tipo,
    rr_gestor.responsable,
    rr_gestor.responsable_norm,
    rr_gestor.rutero,
    rr_gestor.reponedor,
    rr_gestor.rr_persona,
    rr_gestor.modalidad
   FROM rr_gestor
UNION ALL
 SELECT rr_supervisor.cod_rt,
    rr_supervisor.local_nombre_rr,
    rr_supervisor.cliente,
    rr_supervisor.cliente_norm,
    rr_supervisor.responsable_tipo,
    rr_supervisor.responsable,
    rr_supervisor.responsable_norm,
    rr_supervisor.rutero,
    rr_supervisor.reponedor,
    rr_supervisor.rr_persona,
    rr_supervisor.modalidad
   FROM rr_supervisor;

SELECT responsable_tipo,
    responsable,
    responsable_norm,
    cliente,
    cliente_norm,
    cod_rt,
    max(local_nombre_rr) AS local_nombre_rr,
    (count(*))::integer AS rows_scope,
    (count(DISTINCT sku))::integer AS skus_scope,
    (COALESCE(sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (COALESCE(venta_7, 0) = 0) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END), (0)::bigint))::integer AS venta_0,
    (COALESCE(sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(negativo, ''::text))) = 'SI'::text) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END), (0)::bigint))::integer AS negativos,
    (COALESCE(sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(riesgo_quiebre, ''::text))) = 'SI'::text) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END), (0)::bigint))::integer AS quiebres,
    (COALESCE(sum(
        CASE
            WHEN ((NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(otros, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL) AND (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(otros, ''::text))) <> ALL (ARRAY['NO'::text, 'N/A'::text, 'NA'::text, '-'::text]))) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END), (0)::bigint))::integer AS otros
   FROM v_scope_cliente_responsable_fact_bridge
  GROUP BY responsable_tipo, responsable, responsable_norm, cliente, cliente_norm, cod_rt;

Q01.compiled_sql: with objs as ( select 'table' as object_type, schemaname, tablename as object_name from pg_tables where schemaname='public' union all select 'view' as object_type, schemaname, viewname as object_name from pg_views where schemaname='public' union all select 'materialized_view' as object_type, schemaname, matviewname as object_name from pg_matviews where schemaname='public' ) select object_type, schemaname, object_name from objs where object_name in ('mv_scope_fact_latest_cliente','v_scope_cliente_responsable_rr_distinct','v_scope_cliente_responsable_fact_bridge','v_scope_cliente_responsable_summary') order by object_type, object_name;

Q02.compiled_sql: select table_schema, table_name, ordinal_position, column_name, data_type from information_schema.columns where table_schema='public' and table_name in ('mv_scope_fact_latest_cliente','v_scope_cliente_responsable_rr_distinct','v_scope_cliente_responsable_fact_bridge','v_scope_cliente_responsable_summary') order by table_name, ordinal_position;

rows.definition:
SELECT fecha,
    cod_rt,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM nombre_local_rr), ''::text), cod_rt) AS local_nombre_rr,
    marca,
    upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(marca, ''::text))) AS marca_norm,
    sku,
    descripcion_producto AS producto,
    inv_u AS stock,
    venta_u AS venta_7,
        CASE
            WHEN (inv_u < 0) THEN 'SI'::text
            ELSE 'NO'::text
        END AS negativo,
        CASE
            WHEN ((venta_u > 0) AND (inv_u > 0) AND (inv_u < venta_u)) THEN 'SI'::text
            ELSE 'NO'::text
        END AS riesgo_quiebre,
    COALESCE(otros, ''::text) AS otros,
    ingested_at,
    id
   FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON ((btrim(f.cod_rt)), (btrim(f.sku)), (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(f.marca, ''::text))))) f.id,
            f.fecha,
            btrim(f.cod_rt) AS cod_rt,
            f.nombre_local_rr,
            btrim(f.marca) AS marca,
            btrim(f.sku) AS sku,
            f.descripcion_producto,
            f.inv_u,
            f.venta_u,
            f.otros,
            f.ingested_at
           FROM fact_stock_venta f
          WHERE ((NULLIF(btrim(COALESCE(f.cod_rt, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL) AND (NULLIF(btrim(COALESCE(f.sku, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL) AND (NULLIF(btrim(COALESCE(f.marca, ''::text)), ''::text) IS NOT NULL))

            ELSE 0
        END), (0)::bigint))::integer AS otros
   FROM v_scope_cliente_responsable_fact_bridge

Q08.compiled_sql: with objs as ( select 'table' as object_type, schemaname, tablename as object_name from pg_tables where schemaname='public' union all select 'view' as object_type, schemaname, viewname as object_name from pg_views where schemaname='public' union all select 'materialized_view' as object_type, schemaname, matviewname as object_name from pg_matviews where schemaname='public' ), observed_exact as ( select count(*) as c from objs where object_name in ('mv_scope_fact_latest_cliente','v_scope_cliente_responsable_rr_distinct','v_scope_cliente_responsable_fact_bridge','v_scope_cliente_responsable_summary') ), target_exact as ( select count(*) as c from objs where object_name in ('v_cg_cumplimiento_semana_local_parity','v_cg_cumplimiento_semana_scope','v_cg_alertas_control_gestion','v_cg_inicio_jefe','v_cg_inicio_gestor','v_cg_cumplimiento_detalle') ), target_alias as ( select count(*) as c from objs where object_name in ('v_alertas_control_gestion','v_inicio_jefe','v_inicio_gestor','v_cumplimiento_detalle') ) select (observed_exact.c=4) as ready_observed_scope_contract, observed_exact.c as observed_scope_contract_object_count, (target_exact.c=6) as ready_target_b3_contract, target_exact.c as target_b3_exact_object_count, target_alias.c as target_b3_alias_object_count, case when target_exact.c=6 and target_alias.c=4 then 'exact_contract_emitted_with_aliases' when target_exact.c=6 and target_alias.c<4 then observed_exact.c=4 and target_exact.c=6 then 'freeze_db_py_contract_now' when observed_exact.c=4 and target_exact.c between 1 and 5 then 'finish_exact_B3_contract_emit_then_freeze' when observed_exact.c=4 and target_exact.c=0 then 'define_or_emit_final_B3_public_contract' else 'repair_observed_scope_contract_before_B3' end as recommended_next_step from observed_exact, target_exact, target_alias;
